description: Referencing the classic sport shoe, the inspiration for this stylish piece comes from the idea that hardy shoes should not only feel good but also look good. Crafted from genuine nubuck leather, this woodland shoe only gets better with age. The low-top styling, thick midsole and soft overlay make this shoe a closet essential. Wear this with tonal corduroy trousers and a polo t-shirt, or with denims and subtly hued monochrome tees.UpperTwo tone suede upper with nubuck overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelEmbossed branding on the midfoot and tongueLeather liningPadded insole for instep comfortMidsoleFoam midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
